articles.author: Sebastian Starcevic, Victor Jack
articles.title: Don’t ‘blackmail’ us: Europe rejects Trump’s demand to help clean up Hormuz mess - politico.eu
articles.description: “This is not Europe’s war,” the EU tells Washington in a bruising rebuke on Iran even as oil prices rise.
articles.content:
"I hope that we will treat one another with the necessary respect within the alliance, Merz added, in an apparent rebuke to Trumps grousing.
